name: Grace Ndlovu
headline: AI Engineer | LLM Applications | Evaluation Systems
summary: AI engineer with 6 years shipping production LLM applications, including retrieval-augmented systems and evaluation harnesses. Co-author of two peer-reviewed papers on model evaluation methodology.

experience.description: Built retrieval-augmented generation pipeline serving 500K queries/day; led eval-harness rebuild.
Shipped LLM-powered search ranking; co-authored two papers on automated model evaluation.
